criteria.name: Source Citation
criteria.1: No source URLs in frontmatter, or URLs point to generic landing pages rather than player-specific resources, or factual claims in the body have no traceable source.
criteria.3: source_urls includes player-specific URLs for primary data (Savant player page, FanGraphs player page, MLB.com lineups) but some secondary facts (park factor, weather) have no URL.
criteria.5: Every factual claim in the signal body traces to a specific URL in source_urls. Player-specific URLs used (not leaderboard landing pages). League-specific citations where relevant (FanGraphs ATC page, not just the projections index). Weather and park factor URLs included.

criteria.name: Role Classification
criteria.1: Role not set, or signals emitted that do not match role (e.g., qs_probability on a hitter, sb_opportunity on a pitcher), or dual-role player handled incorrectly.
criteria.3: role: hitter or role: pitcher set correctly, correct signals populated, but edge cases (opener, two-way, platoon-only hitter) handled with minor inconsistencies.
criteria.5: role and subrole set correctly including SP/RP distinction. Unused signals are null, not zero. Openers/bulk pitchers flagged explicitly. Dual-eligible players emit separate hitter and pitcher files when applicable.

criteria.name: Form Score Accuracy (hitters) / QS Probability Accuracy (pitchers)
criteria.1: form_score computed from AVG instead of wOBA/xwOBA, or from a single-game sample, or qs_probability computed from wins instead of 6+IP/<=3ER probability.
criteria.3: form_score uses rolling xwOBA vs season baseline with reasonable window, or qs_probability uses IP/ER logic but matchup multiplier is crude or missing.
criteria.5: form_score uses 15-day xwOBA vs season xwOBA scaled as documented; qs_probability starts from ATC-derived or recent QS rate, applies opp wOBA / park / weather multipliers explicitly. League-appropriate (QS not W).

criteria.name: Matchup Composite Correctness
criteria.1: matchup_score is a single component (just park, or just opp SP), weights wrong, or components not normalized to 0-100 before combining.
criteria.3: Weighted composite present with opp SP, park, and platoon, but weather omitted or one component uses raw instead of normalized values.
criteria.5: Full four-component composite (0.40 opp SP + 0.25 park + 0.25 platoon + 0.10 weather), each component normalized to 0-100 first, consumes matchup-analyzer signal when available instead of re-deriving.

criteria.name: OBP and QS Alignment with League
criteria.1: obp_contribution uses AVG instead of OBP/wOBA, or qs_probability uses win-probability / run support, showing unawareness of this league's cats.
criteria.3: obp_contribution uses OBP but no position-baseline normalization, or qs_probability correctly targets 6+IP/<=3ER but ignores the matchup-adjustment step.
criteria.5: obp_contribution uses projected OBP x PAs normalized against position baseline. qs_probability targets 6+IP/<=3ER and explicitly ignores W. Free-swinger discount / walk-rate premium reflected. League context (OBP not AVG, QS not W) cited in methodology.

criteria.name: Regression Index Computation
criteria.1: regression_index absent, or computed as AVG vs xBA only, or sign reversed (positive for lucky).
criteria.3: regression_index computed from xwOBA - wOBA scaled and clamped, but buy/sell threshold not stated or confidence not provided.
criteria.5: regression_index = clamp((xwOBA - wOBA) * 500, -100, +100). Sign convention correct (positive = unlucky / buy). Threshold for action (>=+25 buy, <=-25 sell) cited in body. Confidence reflects whether both inputs were sourceable.

criteria.name: Composite Signal Formulas
criteria.1: daily_quality or streamability_score missing, or computed with incorrect weights, or components not normalized first.
criteria.3: Composite present with documented weights, but does not match the authoritative weights (0.35/0.40/0.25 for daily_quality; 0.40/0.30/0.30 for streamability_score).
criteria.5: daily_quality = 0.35*form + 0.40*matchup + 0.25*opportunity and streamability_score = 0.40*qs_prob + 0.30*k_ceiling + 0.30*(100 - era_whip_risk) exactly. Computed after components, not before. Rounded to integer. Thresholds (>=60 START / >=70 STREAM) cited.

criteria.name: Role / Save-Role Certainty
criteria.1: role_certainty or save_role_certainty absent or invented, or reported as confirmed when lineup not yet posted.
criteria.3: role_certainty set but scale compressed (100 for confirmed, 0 for missing) without intermediate values; save_role_certainty sourced from RotoBaller but tier mapping unclear.
criteria.5: role_certainty uses full scale (100 confirmed / 85 beat writer / 70 projected / 50 platoon / 20 likely bench / 0 IL). save_role_certainty maps explicitly to RotoBaller tiers with cross-check against secondary source.

criteria.name: Confidence and Degradation
criteria.1: All signals report identical confidence (e.g., 1.0 for every signal), or missing data produces zeros instead of null with low confidence, or source failures are not acknowledged.
criteria.3: Per-signal confidences vary plausibly, sources for missing data acknowledged in body but red_team_findings sparse.
criteria.5: Per-signal confidence reflects actual data quality (low when inputs were partial). Any component below 0.4 appears in red_team_findings with severity, likelihood, note, and mitigation. Omitted-data signals are null (not zero). Source-failure fallbacks used and documented.

key_requirements: form_score draws from 15-day xwOBA vs season xwOBA with 40+ PA sample
matchup_score consumes matchup-analyzer signal if present rather than re-deriving
opportunity_score reflects confirmed lineup slot and expected PAs
obp_contribution uses OBP projection (not AVG), normalized against position baseline
regression_index always computed (xwOBA vs wOBA gap)
common_pitfalls: Using AVG instead of OBP in this league
Confusing wOBA (actual) with xwOBA (expected) when computing regression_index
Re-deriving park factor when matchup-analyzer already emitted it

key_requirements: role_certainty <= 70 if lineup not confirmed; cap confidence accordingly
Emit platoon_component correctly in matchup_score (large swing for strong-side vs wrong-side)
Flag as pending in red_team_findings with a mitigation to re-check post-lineup
common_pitfalls: Treating a platoon-half hitter's full-season wOBA as true-talent vs the relevant hand
Setting role_certainty to 100 based on projection rather than confirmation

key_requirements: k_ceiling blends ATC projection with opp team K-rate
era_whip_risk captures park + opp wOBA + pitcher volatility
two_start_bonus lookup from FantasyPros is cited
common_pitfalls: Letting team win probability leak into qs_probability
Ignoring Coors or GABP in era_whip_risk

key_requirements: qs_probability, streamability_score, two_start_bonus set to null (not zero)
save_role_certainty sourced from RotoBaller closer chart with tier mapping explicit
era_whip_risk computed from opp wOBA and pitcher volatility; k_ceiling from projected Ks per appearance
common_pitfalls: Emitting 0 for qs_probability instead of null (implies a claim, not a non-applicable)
Using stale closer-chart data (chart updates after manager comments / blown saves)
Conflating setup men with closers when a team is in committee

common_failure_modes.symptom: A signal value appears in the frontmatter but no URL in source_urls could have produced it.
common_failure_modes.detection: Trace each signal input to a URL. If any input has no citation, flag.
common_failure_modes.fix: Either add the missing URL (re-run the web search) or drop the signal's confidence to 0.3 with a red-team note.

common_failure_modes.symptom: obp_contribution driven by batting average or hit rate rather than on-base percentage.
common_failure_modes.detection: Check formula inputs. If AVG or BA appears, this league's category is violated.
common_failure_modes.fix: Re-compute using OBP (preferred) or wOBA (acceptable). Walks are a feature in this league.

common_failure_modes.symptom: qs_probability correlates with team run support rather than pitcher innings/ER profile.
common_failure_modes.detection: A top SP on a bad offense gets a low qs_probability; a mediocre SP on a great offense gets a high one.
common_failure_modes.fix: qs_probability is independent of team offense. It is P(6+ IP and <=3 ER). Re-derive from pitcher's IP and ER distribution, matchup-adjusted.

common_failure_modes.symptom: A hitter signal file has qs_probability: 0 or a pitcher file has sb_opportunity: 0.
common_failure_modes.detection: Scan frontmatter for signals outside the player's role.
common_failure_modes.fix: Set to null. Zero is a claim; null is non-applicability.

common_failure_modes.symptom: role_certainty: 100 when MLB.com lineups have not yet posted for that game.
common_failure_modes.detection: Check computed_at timestamp vs typical lineup-post time (~2-3h pre-game).
common_failure_modes.fix: If lineup not posted at compute time, role_certainty cap at 70. Flag re-check in red_team_findings.

common_failure_modes.failure: Matchup signal re-derived when matchup-analyzer already emitted
common_failure_modes.symptom: Duplicate computation of park/weather/opp_sp_quality, inconsistent numbers across two signal files for the same game.
common_failure_modes.detection: Compare to same-day matchup signal in signals/ directory.
common_failure_modes.fix: Consume the matchup-analyzer signals directly. Note the source of the consumed values in source_urls.

common_failure_modes.symptom: save_role_certainty uses a RotoBaller chart from last week; recent blown save or manager comment not reflected.
common_failure_modes.detection: Check the chart's own 'last updated' date.
common_failure_modes.fix: Re-fetch chart. Cross-check Pitcher List Bullpen Report for recent news. Lower confidence if any ambiguity.

common_failure_modes.symptom: daily_quality or streamability_score doesn't match the 0.35/0.40/0.25 or 0.40/0.30/0.30 split.
common_failure_modes.detection: Recompute from the three components and compare.
common_failure_modes.fix: Apply authoritative weights from signal-framework.md. Do not improvise.
